---
title: "Session 6: Evaluation Metrics"
subtitle: "Day 2 · Annotation, Gold Standards & Metrics (2-3)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 6: Evaluation Metrics

## 📋 Agenda

- Precision, recall, and F1
- The confusion matrix
- Hands-on practice in Colab

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Precision, recall, F1

## Precision, recall, F1

<!-- to be added -->

# The confusion matrix

## The confusion matrix

<!-- to be added -->

# Hands-on in Colab

## Hands-on in Colab

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
